quarantine.note: Keep B44 local/limited/SBS distinctions, but revisit route_b44-plus because ACE/MTA plus route ids may be SBS-coded dataset route ids rather than distinct plus variants.

original_do_not_merge.reason: route_b44-limited describes the historical B44 Limited limited-stop service that was replaced by B44 SBS in November 2013 (route_type: limited_stop_bus, description: 'Predecessor limited-stop service...replaced by B44 SBS'), while route_b44-local describes the current B44 Local bus service (route_type: local_bus, description: 'B44 local bus service'). These are distinct service variants on the same corridor. The limited record's inclusion of route_b44-local as an identity key is an error from the materializer merging the draft plan observation into the limited record.

route_b44-limited is the historical B44 Limited local-stop service (route_id: B44, route_type: limited_stop_bus), while route_b44-plus is the ACE dataset code 'B44+' (route_id: B44+, route_label: B44+) with no route_type or description. The plus-label variant is distinct from the limited-stop variant. Shared identity key 'route_b44' is a broad shared_base_route label insufficient to override variant mismatch.

route_b44-limited is explicitly described as the 'Predecessor limited-stop service...replaced by B44 SBS in November 2013' — a predecessor relationship, not the same identity. route_b44-sbs is the current Select Bus Service (route_type: select_bus_service). They share base route B44 but are different service types, with one historical and one current.

route_b44-local is the current B44 Local bus (route_id: B44, route_type: local_bus), while route_b44-plus is the ACE dataset code 'B44+' (route_id: B44+, route_label: B44+). Variant mismatch: local vs plus-label. No evidence links B44+ specifically to the local variant.

Different service types: B44 Local (route_type: local_bus) vs B44 Select Bus Service (route_type: select_bus_service). These are distinct variants operating on overlapping but not identical corridors (the SBS uses Rogers/Bedford Avenues northbound while the local uses Nostrand/New York Avenues). Shared base route B44 is insufficient.

route_b44-plus is the ACE dataset code 'B44+' (route_id: B44+), while route_b44-sbs is the B44 Select Bus Service (route_id: B44 / B44-SBS, route_type: select_bus_service). Variant mismatch: plus-label vs ace-dataset/sbs. The ACE dataset code does not identify which specific variant it applies to.

original_rationale: All four records share a base route number (B44) but represent distinct service variants: historical limited-stop (pre-SBS predecessor), current local, ACE dataset code (B44+), and current Select Bus Service. The record_aliases on route_b44-limited incorrectly claim route_b44-local as an alias due to materializer conflation of the draft plan observation; the actual payloads, route_types, and descriptions confirm they are different services. The packet's negative signals (variant mismatches) and review reasons correctly identify that these are distinct identities that should not be merged.
required_follow_up: Resolve blocker before creating accepted merge/do-not-merge overrides.
Do not apply this packet directly to data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
